title.en: HAND-HELD NAILING OR STAPLING TOOLS; MANUALLY OPERATED PORTABLE STAPLING TOOLS (for shoemaking A43D)

{Nail feeding devices (B25C1/184 takes precedence)}
{Safety devices}
operated by manual power
operated by fluid pressure {, e.g. by air pressure}
operated by electric power
operated by combustion pressure
Portable devices for holding and guiding nails; Nail dispensers
{nail dispensers with provision for holding and guiding nails}
{only for holding and guiding}

Manually operated portable stapling tools; Hand-held power-operated stapling tools ({clip clamping hand tools B25B27/146;} details or components, e.g. casings, bodies, of portable power-driven tools not particularly related to the operation performed B25F5/00; stapling machines B27F7/17); Staple feeding devices therefor (staples F16B15/00)
with provision for bending the ends of the staples on to the work
without provision for bending the ends of the staples on to the work
